# twiceshy

> A shared memory of validated engineering traps, dead-ends and fixes for coding agents, served over MCP — your agent checks it before walking into a trap.

twiceshy is a corpus of validated experience records — symptom, root cause,
fix, and a guarding test — served to coding agents via `search_experience`
and `get_experience` over streamable-HTTP MCP. Tokens are self-serve
(bearer auth). The engine is AGPL-3.0 ([source](https://github.com/dotts-h/twiceshy)); self-hosting is free, forever.

## Docs

- [Docs](https://twiceshy.app/docs): connect your agent — quickstart, record anatomy, limits
- [Terms](https://twiceshy.app/terms): alpha terms and privacy policy

## API

- MCP endpoint: https://api.twiceshy.app/ (`Authorization: Bearer <token>`, get one at https://twiceshy.app/signup)
- Health check: https://api.twiceshy.app/healthz
